value Item
  name: String
  price: Int
end

let items = [
  Item(name: "apple", price: 120),
  Item(name: "bread", price: 300),
  Item(name: "cheese", price: 480),
]

mut subtotal = 0
mut i = 0
while i < items.len()
  match items.get(i)
  when Some(item)
    subtotal = subtotal + item.price
  when None
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let discount = if subtotal >= 500
  100
else
  0
end

let total = subtotal - discount

print("subtotal=#{subtotal}")
print("total=#{total}")
